title: iris ruthenica subsp. ruthenica
intro: Iris ruthenica subsp. ruthenica, also known as the Eastern Siberian iris, is a plant species in the Iridaceae family, characterized by its purple or violet flowers and sword-shaped leaves. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to treat respiratory issues, such as coughs and bronchitis, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Iris ruthenica subsp. ruthenica include its potential to reduce inflammation, alleviate symptoms of colds and flu, and even exhibit antiviral properties. Iris ruthenica subsp. ruthenica can be prepared into herbal remedies, such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
